# DomainTools

> Domain and infrastructure lookup suite for humans and AI agents.

DomainTools provides DNS, WHOIS, GeoIP, reverse DNS, domain availability search, site checks, and security scans.
Use the Agent API for structured JSON responses suitable for automation and LLM tool calling.

## Agent API

- Base URL: /api/v1/
- OpenAPI: /api/v1/openapi.json
- Health: /health

### Endpoints

- GET /api/v1/dns?domain=example.com&types=A,MX,TXT
- GET /api/v1/whois?domain=example.com
- GET /api/v1/geo?query=example.com
- GET /api/v1/reverse?query=8.8.8.8
- GET /api/v1/report?domains=example.com,example.org
- POST /api/v1/report — queue async report job (JSON body: {"domains": ["example.com"]})
- GET /api/v1/report/jobs/{job_id} — poll async report job

### Authentication

Agent API is disabled by default. The server must set AGENT_API_ENABLED=1 and AGENT_API_KEY.
Send the key via header X-API-Key: <key> or Authorization: Bearer <key>.
Query-string api_key is not supported.

### Rate limits (per IP, per minute)

- Agent API (general): AGENT_API_RATE_LIMIT_PER_MIN (default 30)
- Agent API report: AGENT_API_REPORT_RATE_LIMIT_PER_MIN (default 10)
- Web tools (DNS/WHOIS/Geo/Reverse): TOOL_RATE_LIMIT_PER_MIN (default 20)
- Domain search: DOMAINS_RATE_LIMIT_PER_MIN (default 10)
- Site checker: SITE_CHECKER_RATE_LIMIT_PER_MIN (default 15)

Limits use Redis with in-memory fallback when Redis is unavailable. Respect 429 responses and retry with backoff.

## Human UI tools

- /dns — DNS record lookup
- /whois — WHOIS lookup
- /geo — GeoIP / ASN lookup
- /reverse — PTR and FCrDNS checks
- /report — combined domain report
- /domains — domain availability search
- /site-checker — HTTP availability and RKN checks
- /security — safe port scanner and passive WordPress checks
- /history — saved lookup history with JSON/CSV export

## Languages

Russian (default) and English. Append ?lang=en or ?lang=ru to any URL.

## Notes for agents

- Prefer /api/v1/* over HTML scraping.
- Do not brute-force Security scanners; they are rate-limited and captcha-protected in the web UI.
- Batch report size is limited; split large domain lists into multiple requests.
